items.title: Small Cell Lung Cancer Market Research 2025-2035: Growth Driven by Advancements in Novel Therapies, Including Immunotherapies, Targeted Therapies, and Combination Treatments

items.description: Global small cell lung cancer market expected to grow significantly, driven by advancements in immunotherapies, targeted treatments, and improved diagnostic technologies, despite challenges like high treatment costs and drug resistance.
